Privacy Policy

Last updated: 2026-03-09

This Privacy Policy explains how personal information is collected, used, disclosed, stored, and protected when you interact with Cinturon360 and related services operated by RePass Cloud Pty Ltd.

If you do not agree with this Privacy Policy, do not use the Services.

1. Who We Are

This Privacy Policy applies to RePass Cloud Pty Ltd.

RePass Cloud Pty Ltd
PO BOX 262
Bondi Junction NSW 1355
Australia

Email: hello@repasscloud.com

2. Roles: Controller and Processor

Depending on the context, RePass Cloud may act as either:

  • Data controller, such as when operating our websites, managing accounts, handling billing, or running marketing and business administration activities.
  • Data processor / service provider, such as when processing personal information on behalf of a business customer using Cinturon360.

3. Information We Collect

We may collect information directly from you, from your organisation, from your device or browser, or from service providers that help us operate the Services.

Identity and account data

  • Name, email address, organisation name
  • User roles and permissions
  • Authentication identifiers issued by identity providers

Customer content and business data

Customers may submit traveller profiles, booking or operational data, approval and workflow data, and communications entered into the platform.

Operational, audit, and security logs

IP addresses, authentication logs, application and API access logs, audit logs, error logs, and performance telemetry.

Device and technical data

Browser type, device type, operating system, approximate location from IP, session metadata.

Billing and payment data

Billing contact details and transaction metadata. Payment processing is handled by third-party providers. We do not store full payment card numbers.

4. How We Use Information

  • Provide and operate Cinturon360 and related services
  • Authenticate users and manage access
  • Deliver customer support and respond to enquiries
  • Maintain security, detect abuse, prevent fraud
  • Manage billing, accounting, and business administration
  • Comply with legal obligations
  • Improve products and services

5. Legal Bases for Processing

  • Contract — to provide the Services requested
  • Legitimate interests — securing and improving the Services, preventing fraud
  • Consent — where required for marketing, cookies, or optional activities
  • Legal obligation — where processing is required by law

6. Cookies and Similar Technologies

We may use cookies for authentication, security, preferences, analytics, and, where permitted, advertising activities. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

7. Disclosure of Information

We may disclose information to cloud hosting providers, identity providers, payment processors, security vendors, analytics vendors, professional advisers, regulators, and business transferees. RePass Cloud does not sell personal information.

8. Hosting and International Transfers

Australia and New Zealand customers are hosted in Microsoft Azure Australia regions by default. Where information is transferred across borders, we use appropriate safeguards including contractual protections, encryption, and access controls.

9. Security

Security measures include encryption in transit and at rest, role-based access control, multi-factor authentication, audit logging, and incident response procedures.

10. Data Retention

  • Security and telemetry logs: generally 90 to 100 days
  • Customer content: per customer instructions and contract terms
  • Backups: limited periods as part of backup lifecycle management

11. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, rectify, erase, restrict, object to, or port your personal information. To exercise rights, contact hello@repasscloud.com.

12. Children's Privacy

Cinturon360 is not intended for children under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

13. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates when it was last revised.

14. Contact Us

RePass Cloud Pty Ltd
PO BOX 262, Bondi Junction NSW 1355, Australia
hello@repasscloud.com
